empty404.title: 404 - Not Found
empty404.description: The page you are looking for does not exist. Please check the URL or return back.

emptyError.title: Oops, something went wrong.
emptyError.description: There was a technical issue on our end. Please try again later.

formAddWord.toastSuccess: The word has been added to your dictionary

signUpPage.title: Create an account
signUpPage.subtitle: Sign up to start using Ai Smart Dictionary

signInPage.title: Welcome to Ai Smart Dictionary
signInPage.subtitle: Enter your email and password to sign in to your account

cardConfirmEmail.title: Check your email
cardConfirmEmail.description: We have sent a confirmation link to:
cardConfirmEmail.main: Please follow the link in the email to activate your account. This will help us keep your profile secure.
cardConfirmEmail.note: Don't see the email? Check your Spam folder or try sending your request again.

buttonResendEmail.repeatSending: Send the email again{hasTime, select, true { in {time} seconds} other {}}
buttonResendEmail.success: A new confirmation email has been sent to your email.
buttonResendEmail.error: Failed to send email.{hasTime, select, true { Try again in {time} seconds.} other { Try again later.}}

emailVerified.title: Email successfully confirmed!
emailVerified.description: Your account has been activated. You can close this tab and return to the previous page.
emailVerified.closeHint: You can now safely close this window.
